title: Craft Planet Fun Stickers, Rainbows, Stickers For Young Crafters, Posters, Card Making, Scrapbooking, Party Bag Fillers, Sticker Book, Reward Chart Stickers, Invites, Craft Supplies
features: CRAFTING Stickers are a must-have in any young crafters collection! The simple and clean way to add character and fun to craft makes. Kids can build creations around stickers or add them into their own sticker designs

CREATIVITY Stickers with themes are perfect for invites or cards, scrapbook designs or decorating kids bags, books, laptop or toy car. Can also be used for kids reward charts. Stickers are great for those with a particular interest or hobby
EASE Self-adhesive stickers are easy-to-use, simply peel off backing sheets and stick onto desired area. Fun stickers adds a level of texture and dimension to childrens craft projects and creations

IDEAL Cute stickers are great for birthday, party, gift wrapping, Christmas, decorating card envelopes or as party bag fillers. The creative options are endless for kids. Stickers are aesthetic for children

BRAND Range of craft products are perfect for enhancing & developing children's creativity & enabling them to get making anything & everything they can think of. Let their imaginations run wild with craft products. Adds texture and colour to makes
description: Craft Planet is truly out of this world! Enhance, and inspire children’s creativity by letting their imagination run wild with Craft Planet’s vast collection of pens, pads and papers. Add extra expressions of creativity with cool and colourful embellishments such as beads, feathers and crazy wiggly eyes! Don’t forget our Funky Foam and Felt, available in pre-cut shapes or sheets for unlimited opportunities to play, create and develop. And, no kids’ range is complete without some PVA glue and the all-important glitter! Craft Planet’s high-quality craft materials give kids the freedom to experiment, learn and develop through art, craft and creativity.
